title: macaranga induta subsp. induta
intro: Macaranga induta subsp. induta, also known as the hairy tree or Macaranga induta, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Macaranga induta subsp. induta include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and astringent. Macaranga induta subsp. induta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
